task_completion.description: Open the Chinook database in LibreOffice Base
task_completion.visual_evidence: A LibreOffice Base window is open with 'chinook.odb' visible in the title bar.

task_completion.description: Create the query for table columns with correct fields, filters, and sorting
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query editor window (SQL view or Design view) showing a query on the 'SYSTEM_COLUMNS' table. It must select TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, TYPE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION, and IS_NULLABLE. It must include a filter for the 'PUBLIC' schema and show sorting by TABLE_NAME then ORDINAL_POSITION.
The name 'TableColumnCatalog' appears in the list of Queries in the main LibreOffice Base window.

task_completion.description: Create the query for primary keys with correct fields, filters, and sorting
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query editor window (SQL view or Design view) showing a query on the 'SYSTEM_PRIMARYKEYS' table. It must select TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, KEY_SEQ, and PK_NAME. It must include a filter for the 'PUBLIC' schema and show sorting by TABLE_NAME then KEY_SEQ.
The name 'PrimaryKeyCatalog' appears in the list of Queries in the main LibreOffice Base window alongside the first query.

task_completion.description: Save the database file to persist changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save icon (floppy disk) is clicked in the main LibreOffice Base window, or the unsaved indicator (often an asterisk in the title bar) disappears after the queries are created.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Base GUI to create the queries
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Base interface (Query Design or SQL View) rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying the .odb file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually created SQL queries rather than typing static tables
integrity.visual_evidence: The query editor shows actual SQL syntax (SELECT ... FROM SYSTEM_COLUMNS ...) or GUI query design blocks, not a manually constructed static table of text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts or sqlite3/hsqldb command-line tools being used to inject the queries into the database file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database is located at /home/ga/chinook.odb. The 'TableColumnCatalog' query MUST use the HSQLDB system table 'SYSTEM_COLUMNS' and select exactly: TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, TYPE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION, and IS_NULLABLE, filtered to the 'PUBLIC' schema. The 'PrimaryKeyCatalog' query MUST use the system table 'SYSTEM_PRIMARYKEYS' and select exactly: TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, KEY_SEQ, and PK_NAME, filtered to the 'PUBLIC' schema. Both queries must be saved within the LibreOffice Base GUI.
